children.heading: Notification of Commission of proposed action; public comment
children.label: a Notification of Commission of proposed action; public comment
children.text: Except as provided in , whenever the Secretary proposes to prescribe rules, regulations, and statements of policy of general applicability in the exercise of any function which is transferred to the Secretary under or , he shall notify the Commission of the proposed action. If the Commission, in its discretion, determines within such period as the Secretary may prescribe, that the proposed action may significantly affect any function within the jurisdiction of the Commission pursuant to section 7172(a)(1) and (c)(1) of this title and , the Secretary shall immediately refer the matter to the Commission, which shall provide an opportunity for public comment.section 7173 of this titlesection 7151 of this titlesection 60501 of title 49section 60502 of title 49
concur in adoption of the rule or statement as proposed by the Secretary;
concur in adoption of the rule or statement only with such changes as it may recommend; or
recommend that the rule or statement not be adopted.

children.heading: Options of Secretary; final agency action
children.label: c Options of Secretary; final agency action

children.text: issuing a final rule or statement in the form initially proposed by the Secretary if the Commission has concurred in such rule pursuant to subsection (b)(1);

issuing a final rule or statement in amended form so that the rule conforms in all respects with the changes proposed by the Commission if the Commission has concurred in such rule or statement pursuant to subsection (b)(2); or
ordering that the rule shall not be issued.
